scanner.scanInstruction: Point the camera at the store's QR code
scanner.offlineScannerDesc: You cannot redeem coupons without an internet connection. Try again when you regain signal.

terms.title: Terms & Privacy
terms.sec1Text: By accessing and using Nabbu, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use the application.
terms.sec2Text: Nabbu requires access to your real-time geographical location to show nearby deals. This data is processed ephemerally for querying purposes and is not shared with third parties for advertising.
terms.sec3Text: Coupons and offers are the sole responsibility of the issuing merchants. We do not guarantee immediate availability or quality of products offered by third parties.
terms.sec4Text: We collect only the information necessary to manage your profile and benefits. Your data is protected using high-level encryption and security standards. We will never sell your personal information.
terms.sec5Text: You have the right to access, rectify, or delete your data at any time from your profile. We are committed to transparency in handling your information in compliance with current data protection laws.
terms.footer: © 2026 Nabbu. All rights reserved. For legal inquiries or support, contact us at support@nabbu.com

support.title: Help Center
support.faq1Q: How do I redeem a coupon?
support.faq1A: To redeem a coupon, go to the 'My Coupons' section, select the one you want to use, and press 'Redeem Now'. A QR code will be displayed for the merchant to scan.
support.faq2Q: Why don't I see deals near me?
support.faq2A: Make sure you have granted location permissions to the application. If you are in a new area, try refreshing the home page to search for nearby merchants.
support.faq3A: Absolutely. We only collect the basics to manage your account (Email) and ephemeral location for offers. We do not share your information with third parties.
support.faq4Q: The merchant doesn't accept my code, what do I do?
support.faq4A: Verify that the coupon has not expired. If everything is in order and the problem persists, take a screenshot and contact us immediately via the support button below.

about.title: About

guide.stepStandaloneIntro: Since the app is installed, you must change permissions in system settings.
guide.stepBrowserIntro: Follow these steps in your browser:
guide.stepBrowserLock: Tap the Lock icon 🔒 or Settings (AA) in the address bar.
guide.stepAndroidApp: Long press the App icon > Info (i) > Permissions
guide.stepIosApp: Go to Settings > Find 'Nabbu' > Enable permissions
guide.stepCopyLink: If you can't find settings, open Chrome or Safari and paste this link:

bridge.title: Permissions Manager
bridge.desc: Configure the necessary access to use all Nabbu features.
bridge.cameraExp: When you click the button, your browser will ask for camera permission. This is only used to scan QR codes at stores.
bridge.locationExp: We need to know your location to show you the closest deals and guide you to them on the map.
bridge.notifExp: Get alerted before your coupons expire so you never miss out on your savings.
bridge.returnDesc: You can now close this tab and return to the Nabbu App.
bridge.browserOnly: You are in the browser's secure management mode.
